A repetitive work loop was detected, so the current turn was stopped.

{reason}
turn.iterationLimit.emptyResponse.messag: The agent reached the tool iteration limit ({maxIterations}) and could not produce a final response.
turn.iterationLimit.system.message: The agent has reached the {maxIterations} tool-iteration limit. Do not call tools. Provide the final user-facing assistant response now, summarizing what was completed and any remaining issue.
protocol.session.connectionTokenUnavaila: Session is not available for this connection token.
protocol.session.alreadyRunning.error: Session is already running; interrupt it before sending another request.
protocol.session.createTargetRequired.er: Session create requires userid and projectName.
protocol.projectPath.outsideWorkspace.er: projectName must name a direct workspace child folder.
protocol.session.createProjectMismatch.e: Session create project identity does not match this request.
protocol.skillList.projectRequired.error: Skill list requires a negotiated project or session connection token.
protocol.session.renameUnavailable.error: Session is not available for this rename request.

protocol.session.attachUnavailable.error: Session is not available for this attach request.
protocol.session.attachProjectMismatch.e: Session project identity does not match this attach request.
protocol.connectionToken.expired.error: Connection token is missing or expired.
protocol.accountSelection.required.error: Account selection is required before any other work.
protocol.projectConfig.required.error: projectName is required in one project.configure message.
